corpus.snippet: The Regional Development Authority released its annual report covering activitie...
corpus.content: The Regional Development Authority released its annual report covering activities across workforce development. Key highlights include expanded partnerships and a 5.4% increase in participation. The report is available on their website.

corpus.title: Crestview Procurement Notice — Contract Award 2024-INF-009
corpus.snippet: Crestview municipality awarded a $4.7M infrastructure contract to Hartwell Construction for road resurfacing, completing...
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL CONTRACT AWARD NOTICE
Contract ID: 2024-INF-009 | Awarded: March 22, 2024

Scope: Arterial road resurfacing — 23.4 lane-miles across 6 corridors
Awardee: Hartwell Construction Group, Inc.
Contract Value: $4,712,400 (fixed price)
Completion Deadline: December 15, 2024

Selection basis: Lowest responsive bid. Three bids received; Hartwell bid $4.71M vs. next-lowest $5.3M.
Approved by: Director of Public Works, March 22, 2024.

corpus.title: Post: Cascade Biotech Quarterly Update
corpus.snippet: Cascade Biotech reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Re...
corpus.content: Cascade Biotech reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $364M was up 3.3% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.

corpus.title: Follow-up: Crestview — Propagated Report
corpus.snippet: Follow-up coverage: Crestview municipality awarded a $4.7M infrastructure contra...
corpus.content:
Crestview ANNOUNCES CONTINUED MUNICIPAL CONTROVERSY

Multiple sources now confirm: Crestview municipality awarded a $4.7M infrastructure contract to Hartwell Construction for road resurfacing, completing work by Q4 2024. The announcement comes as reports circulating about municipal. Observers say this could have significant implications for municipal stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.
